ai-w10-e1.answer: Add springdoc to Spring Boot. Generate OpenAPI. Export JSON to repo.
ai-w10-e1.realWorld: CI fails if undocumented endpoint added — optional advanced step.

ai-w10-e2.answer: Build Postman collection with tests for 3 endpoints. Share export.json in repo.

ai-w10-e3.answer: Review URI design: plural nouns, no verbs in path, nested resources max 2 levels.

ai-w10-e4.answer: 400 bad request (malformed), 422 unprocessable (valid JSON, business rule fail), 409 conflict (duplicate).

ai-w10-e5.answer: Add ?page=0&size=20&sort=name,asc. Document in OpenAPI. AI suggests defaults.
ai-w10-e5.realWorld: Pageable in Spring: PageRequest.of(page, size, Sort.by("name")).

ai-w10-e6.answer: Review Entity→DTO mapping. Ask if MapStruct or manual mapper is cleaner. Avoid exposing entities.
ai-w10-e6.realWorld: UserDTO without password hash — security + stable API contract.

ai-w10-e7.answer: Scan DTOs for missing @NotNull, @Email, @Size. Add validation messages.
ai-w10-e7.realWorld: Clear message: 'Email must be valid' helps frontend show errors.

ai-w10-e8.answer: Edge API tests: empty body, huge payload, wrong Content-Type, expired token.
ai-w10-e8.realWorld: 413 or 400 on 10MB JSON when limit is 1MB — define and test.

ai-w10-e9.answer: Rate limiting (Bucket4j, gateway) and CORS allowed origins — AI suggests config snippets.
ai-w10-e9.realWorld: CORS * in prod is risky — whitelist frontend domain only.

ai-w10-e10.answer: Trim API responses: no internal ids leak, pagination meta, HATEOAS links optional.
ai-w10-e10.realWorld: {data:[], page:0, total:100} — consistent envelope helps clients.
